briefdescription.para: Constructs a GeniusProver with default settings.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::size_t rows_amount, const unsigned int max_step=1, std::size_t expand_factor=0)
memberdef.name: MakeFRIParams

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::size_t r, const unsigned int max_step)
memberdef.name: GenerateRandomStepList
